title: koellia californica
intro: Koellia californica, also known as California licorice root, is a perennial plant that belongs to the family Boraginaceae, native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The medicinal properties of Koellia californica include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it a popular natural remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Koellia californica include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support immune function, among others. Koellia californica can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, allowing for its medicinal properties to be easily harnessed.
